mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drug ( DS_NO, DS_NM, DS_ADDR, DS_TELNO, DS_LAT, DS_LOT, DS_OP_TM, DS_END_TM, DS_WKND_OPEN_YN ) VALUES ( #{dsNo}, #{dsNm}, #{dsAddr}, #{dsTelno}, #{dsLat}, #{dsLot}, #{dsOpTm}, #{dsEndTm}, #{dsWkndOpenYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT DS_NO, DS_NM, DS_ADDR, DS_TELNO, DS_LAT, DS_LOT, DS_OP_TM, DS_END_TM, DS_WKND_OPEN_YN FROM drug WHERE DS_NO = #{dsNo}
SELECT DS_NO, DS_NM, DS_ADDR, DS_TELNO, DS_LAT, DS_LOT, DS_OP_TM, DS_END_TM, DS_WKND_OPEN_YN FROM drug ORDER BY DS_NO ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, T1.* FROM ( SELECT DS_NO, DS_NM, DS_ADDR, DS_TELNO, DS_LAT, DS_LOT, DS_OP_TM, DS_END_TM, DS_WKND_OPEN_YN FROM drug WHERE 1 = 1
AND DS_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND DS_ADDR LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
ORDER BY DS_NO ASC ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM <= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + #{pageSize} ) TT1 WHERE rnum >= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + 1
